title: Cystacanthus turgida
taxonomy: Cystacanthus turgida is classified within the family Acanthaceae, which includes various flowering plants commonly known as acanthus or thorny acacia. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its growth habit, leaf structure, and flower morphology. The Acanthaceae family comprises over 2,000 species found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide.
